name: archive-legacy-item-records-no-example-no-skiplist
description: handleArchive on a legacy item (model_tier=NULL AND classification=NULL — i.e. a row that was tracked before triage v1 or by a non-classifier path) must resolve the row but MUST NOT record a triage_examples entry (no classifier decision to learn from) and MUST NOT touch the skip-list (no model signal). Guards the two `if (item.model_tier !== null)` / `if (item.classification)` gates in queue-actions.ts:handleArchive against accidental removal.

db.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM tracked_items WHERE id = $fixture:0 AND state = 'resolved' AND resolution_method = 'manual:button'
SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM triage_examples WHERE tracked_item_id = $fixture:0
SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM triage_skip_list WHERE pattern = 'legacy@noreply.com'
